description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Linux Packages that runs on push to master, linux branches and tags. Use a matrix strategy to build Linux packages for different environments, including Ubuntu and CentOS with various CUDA versions. For each job, prepare the build environment, checkout code and dependencies, set up Docker Buildx, build a Docker image, and create a package using the Docker image. Finally, upload the package as a release asset if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
